items.definition_en: A birthday is the yearly celebration of the day someone was born.
items.example_en: We had a big party for her birthday.

items.definition_en: An anniversary is a date when something important happened in a previous year.
items.example_en: They celebrate their wedding anniversary every June.

items.definition_en: A wedding is a ceremony where two people get married.
items.example_en: My cousin’s wedding was last summer.

items.definition_en: A meeting is when people gather to talk about something.
items.example_en: We have a team meeting on Monday.

items.definition_en: An appointment is a set time to meet someone, often for business or health.
items.example_en: I have a doctor’s appointment at 10.

items.definition_en: A festival is a special event with music, food, or traditions.
items.example_en: We went to the music festival together.

items.definition_en: A party is a social gathering to celebrate or have fun.
items.example_en: The children enjoyed the birthday party.

items.definition_en: A celebration is a joyful event for a special reason.
items.example_en: There was a big celebration for the new year.

items.definition_en: The holiday season is the time around Christmas and New Year.
items.example_en: The town is decorated during the holiday season.

items.definition_en: A picnic is a meal you eat outdoors, usually on a trip.
items.example_en: We had a picnic in the park.

items.definition_en: A ceremony is a formal event usually marking an important occasion.
items.example_en: The graduation ceremony was very moving.

items.definition_en: A parade is an event where people march or ride in lines to celebrate.
items.example_en: There is a big parade on Independence Day.

items.definition_en: A gathering is when people come together, often socially.
items.example_en: The family gathering was held in December.

items.definition_en: A concert is a live performance of music.
items.example_en: We went to a concert last night.

items.definition_en: Opening day is the first time something is open or happens.
items.example_en: The store was crowded on opening day.

items.definition_en: A family reunion is a special event where family members meet.
items.example_en: We see all our relatives at the family reunion.

items.definition_en: Deadline day is the last day something must be finished.
items.example_en: Everyone was busy on deadline day.

items.definition_en: An open house is an event where people can freely visit a place.
items.example_en: Many parents came to the school’s open house.

items.definition_en: Remembrance day is a special day to remember important people or events.
items.example_en: They laid flowers on remembrance day.

items.definition_en: Movie night is a time when people watch films together.
items.example_en: We have movie night every Friday at home.
